text: After two years of frustration unsuccessfully navigating my divorce case, I decided that it was time to change lawyers. Having interviewed numerous highly reputed divorce lawyers, I decided to retain Mr. Durbin. It was the best decision I ever made. Mr. Durbin is a brilliant lawyer. He continues to prove this time after time with his laudable work ethic, meticulousness and conscientiousness. Moreover, Mr. Durbin's conduct is always highly professional, and even more importantly, highly ethical. This is evident in the manner in which he approaches new situations. He always thoroughly reviews and researches all relevant materials, and then clearly communicates to me all possibilities and potential consequences. Thanks to Mr. Durbin's diligence and excellent communication skills, I am able to make informed decisions that I feel comfortable with. I can finally put my worries to rest and concentrate on my other priorities (mainly, my Ph.D. studies), knowing that my case is in good hands.

It is important that these reviews are not abused, and are used appropriately. Mr. Durbin (we are related) has been my lawyer in a high conflict Divorce that has lasted several years. He is one of 3 Lawyers that I have had. Each lawyer has received slanderous reviews immediately following a motion or Arbitration that are worded almost exactly the same. There are 2 such reviews dated 4/22/11 and 5/3/12 that are no doubt written by my ex-husband (a lawyer) following motions that he lost (and had high costs awarded to me). I feel it is important that people are aware and careful and think about "who" is writing these reviews. It is fair to say that it was Mr. Durbin's (and my own) success and my ex-husbands losing (and anger as a result) that ignited these 2 bad emails he wrote on this website. I am writing this in hope that people don't allow angry ex-husbands to sway their choice in a Lawyer. I have had 2/3 GREAT Lawyers and Mr. Durbin did a phenomenal job for me and for my children

In August 2011 Steven Represented me for a case conference in Hamilton. Stephen was awesome he was calm,cool and collected my ex was unrepresented so you can imagine what we had to go through and still with plenty of patience he kept his ground stuck to the reason we were there and we came out on top (at a case conference). I look forward to Stephen representing me through the rest of my case I believe he will get me the proper child support I'm suppose to receive. With Stephen's knowledge,professionalism and confidence going into the court system I actually don't feel worried going into the next round. Thank you Stephen Durbin for not only looking out for me but for your guidance as well. L Martin

Stephen Durbin and his team are complete experts and are partners who keep your best interests at heart. I felt like I was in great hands and I was relieved to have had his guidance, knowledge, and wisdom to help me through a difficult time. Thank you!

Stephen did some urgent corporate work for my company (license agreements for renewable energy technology) when our corporate counsel was overloaded. He was out of his normal area, but I have still rated him a 5 on Knowledge because he researched the subject so quickly and thoroughly that he actually became MORE knowledgeable on the subject than our in-house guy in just a few days. Awesome! I have never seen a lawyer so dedicated to doing not just a great job but an outstanding one. Thanks Steve - I would hire you again in a heartbeat. Tony H.

I can't thank Stephen enough for all the amazing work he's done for me and my family. His knowledge, reassurance, wisdom, and experience put me at ease during a difficult time. Thank you for everything.

“I just wanted to take a moment on behalf of my family and myself to thank you very much for all the hard work and time you have put into this custody trial. I was very impressed with how you went about things, the time you took to do the research, and most of all how you were able to show A’s (the opposing party’s) true colors. I truly appreciate the job you have done. I know your closing argument will be very powerful. It is incredible to see the relief my son has, since the trial is over”
Best Regards,
K

Two years ago, I had the good fortune to be referred to Stephen Durbin.  He was the fourth lawyer to represent me in an estate matter that had been the subject of continuous litigation for over 10 years.  Despite the large sums of money that had previously been spent on legal fees, and the time elapsed, I had made little progress in resolving the matter.  Within months of being retained, Mr. Durbin was able to negotiate an acceptable settlement to end what had been an intractable legal problem. Sadly, the end of one legal problem was followed by another, as my wife of 22 years began divorce proceedings.  I again retained Mr. Durbin to represent me in that matter.  On two occasions Mr. Durbin was obliged to represent me in Court on Motions relating to my children.  He was successful in both and I was awarded legal costs.  Mr. Durbin’s incisiveness, sensibility, and practical understanding of the likely legal outcome, and his ability to avoid the emotional element that is inherent in family law, was key in negotiating a final settlement in my favor.

Stephen and his team especially  Melissa and Eyrene have been working on my case more than four years. They were on my case since the beginning providing great advice and support and representing me well at the court. Although I live and work overseas and with the time difference, I always felt they treated my case as I was living in Canada. This is important as you are not the on the ground and you never know how your lawyer will treat when you are overseas. Thank you Stephen, Melissa and Eyrene for your service and support. Highly recommended.
Youssef Abboud

Great first meeting and plan.  My associate was knowledgable and it was great to have Stephen on the call as well.  They preach a team approach where junior lawyers and seasoned lawyers work together.  Will change this review depending on further interactions!!!

Finding and choosing a lawyer can be stressful, I consider myself very lucky that I came across Stephen Durbin and Associates.  The initial intake was simple and gave opportunity to share necessary information and upload documents if applicable.  Very efficient and time saver to prepare for the initial consultation.  Definitely consider Stephen Durbin and Associates if in need of a Family Law solicitor.
Everything went really smooth
Don't follow through with what was promised for the thousands spent to this day

I don't know what I would have done without Mr. Durbin. Stephen is truly a master in the courtroom. We had a six day custody trial and everyday he amazed my family and I with his knowledge of the law. He was always honest and upfront with me on my chances of success. He devoted his heart and soul into my case and in the end we were successful in gaining joint custody with my home as primary residence and were also awarded a substantial amount of court costs. Stephen is a great person in and outside of the courtroom and is always there when I need him. I highly recommend Stephen Durbin as a lawyer and as a friend. Thank you Stephen.
Great and professional. Interactions have been amazing.

I am a lawyer of many years at the bar. I know what to look for. I met Stephen almost a decade ago when I went in with someone close to me looking for a good divorce law firm. His firm took on the case and achieved unparallelled success. I wouldn’t recommend anyone else and in fact, I recommend all of my clients needing assistance in this field of law to him and his firm. I’ve only heard shining reviews from each of those I’ve sent. Don’t believe the few bad reviews that you read about him. Or his firm. That happens all the time with disgruntled clients, but more with opposing parties or other people who have an interest in bringing him down. I can vouch for that
The onboarding experience with the associate lawyer Afnan Arshad  and her clerk Jane Kameoka were very good. They were professional and provided great customer service!
responseFromOwnerText: We truly appreciate your feedback. It’s great to hear that Afnan and Jane were able to support you so well during your onboarding. Thank you for choosing our firm.

text: Since my first appointment, everything has been excellent. My lawyer has been very accurate in her advice regarding my case, and communication has been great at all times. I feel very safe and supported by the SD&A Group.
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for sharing your experience and for choosing to work with us. It means a lot to know that our efforts to provide clear advice and strong support have made a meaningful difference for you.

text:
I had the opportunity to work with Lisa and Afnan, and I was thoroughly impressed by their professionalism, diligence, and expertise. Throughout the process, they demonstrated exceptional communication skills, precise attention to detail, and a genuine commitment to achieving the best possible outcome.

Both Lisa and Afnan were consistently responsive, organized, and supportive, ensuring that I understood each step along the way. I particularly appreciated that Lisa also speaks French, which was a great advantage for me and made our communication even smoother.
Their professionalism and collaborative approach made the experience both efficient and reassuring. I highly recommend Lisa or Afnan to anyone seeking knowledgeable, reliable, and dedicated legal professionals.
responseFromOwnerText:
We sincerely appreciate your kind words and recommendation. It’s wonderful to know that Lisa and Afnan’s professionalism, communication, and dedication made such a positive impression. 

Providing clear guidance and support throughout the process is always our priority. 

Thank you for choosing our firm.

text:
I have the honor to express my deepest admiration for the work and exceptional professionalism of Stephen Durbin. He is not only a brilliant lawyer but also a person of impeccable reputation, remarkable intelligence, and a rare sense of justice.

Stephen Durbin embodies the qualities that distinguish true masters of their profession: outstanding competence, strategic thinking, impeccable tact, and genuine respect for every individual. His approach to every case is thoughtful, precise, and rooted in a profound understanding of the law.

He has a remarkable ability to identify the essence of even the most complex legal situations, make balanced decisions, and defend his position with dignity and strength. Thanks to his professionalism and dedication, many people have received not only legal protection but also restored confidence in justice.

Stephen Durbin is a lawyer you can trust without hesitation. His name has become a symbol of reliability, intelligence, and the highest standards of legal excellence.
From booking an initial consultation with Christina to meeting with the amazing Alessandra to discuss my case .. the process was fluid, transparent and professional.

I contacted Stephen some time ago with a problem I was having with my business. My landlord wanted to buy me out of my lease. Business was pretty bad anyway so I was almost willing to take a very small amount that he offered $68,000 (all numbers expressed here are in current value dollar amounts). Stephen told me to leave it in his hands and see what he could do. Little by little he negotiated with the landlord, bringing him up first to $360,000, then to $540,000, then to finally about $810,000! I was shocked that this was the result. But he clearly must know what he’s doing. This changed my life for the better and gave me another chance. I’m very thankful.

I couldn’t be more grateful for the outstanding service provided by Afnan Arshad. From our very first meeting, she demonstrated not only deep expertise and knowledge of the law but also genuine care and commitment to my case. She was always responsive, explained every step of the process clearly, and fought diligently to achieve the best possible outcome for me. Her professionalism, attention to detail, and dedication made a stressful situation much more manageable. I highly recommend Afnan to anyone in need of excellent legal representation.

Heartfelt Appreciation for Ms. Jane Kameoka

I’m writing with heartfelt thanks and deep appreciation for Ms. Jane Kameoka.
I am truly honoured and grateful for her unwavering support—her dedication has meant more to me than words can express. Over the course of a very complex and prolonged seven-year legal battle, Ms. Kameoka provided me with exceptional service, professionalism, and compassion.

Her legal expertise, clear communication, and strategic thinking were invaluable throughout my case. Her understanding of the facts and evidence was nothing short of brilliant. Thanks to her tireless efforts, I not only felt consistently supported but also achieved a favorable judgment.

Together with Ms. Mehwish Rashid, Jane Kameoka forms a highly skilled, client-focused legal team. They work diligently to resolve family law matters efficiently and effectively—avoiding unnecessary conflict and costly court proceedings whenever possible. When litigation is required, they stay focused on the core issues to help clients move forward with clarity and peace of mind.

I am forever grateful for Jane’s dedication and support, and I wholeheartedly recommend her to anyone in need of expert legal assistance.

Thank you again for your continued loyalty and care.
responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for your kind and heartfelt words. We’re honoured to have supported you through your legal matter, and we truly appreciate your recognition of Jane Kameoka’s dedication and expertise.

Your trust means a great deal to us, and we’re grateful to have been part of your journey.

text: Lisa Stern at Durbin & Associates did an amazing job supporting us through the entire family law process. We could not have done it without her ! Her patience and guidance during such a stressful time made all the difference in our experience !
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your kind words! We’re thrilled to hear that Lisa Stern was able to provide the support you needed during a challenging time. At Stephen Durbin & Associates, we truly value our clients and their experiences, and it’s wonderful to know that Lisa made such a positive impact on yours. If you ever need assistance again, we’re here for you!

text: Afnan is super attentive and knowledgeable lawyer. She is highly aware of manipulative tactics and abusive strategies often used by the opposing ( abusive/ manipulative ) party, I completely trust her and highly recommend her.

I had a lawyer previously before SDA Law firm and I had spend so much money and nothing came of it. than I found SDA lawyers, Lisa Stern and her assistant Rosa Fuda, was there to help me and in such a short time all my divorce was process and completed . I am so grateful to them,  They keep working with me and did not let me down even when all the court was done, they stayed and still help me to get all document I needed. their patience and their work attic is fabulous.   I recommend them to any one.  thank you so much.

I had  a consultation meeting with Mehwish she was rude and condescending, unexpected from a family law professional but I had the worst experience with this woman. It’s been 6 months yet so fresh in my memory. I’ve met with lawyers in the past, no one has ever made me feel this way, respect in professional settings is so basic. Her bias was so visible, not sure where it came from, but so strong it had to show on the outside. An unforgettable experience. My case was high conflict one, she left me feeling worse, could barely even express myself further at some point as I began to feel incoherent and misunderstood because she kept changing the line of discussion, blurting into my responses, giving very cold stares. She just refused to listen. I gave up and literally broke down, wishing I could turn back the hands of time, to avoid this place. I thought I had read some good reviews before going there. I was not asking for pity or sympathy, just basic guidance.
She also seemed to be rushing to close the meeting, from the first 5mins she was rushing, and this session wasn’t even free, it cost $220
She communicated a generic guideline at the start, yet failed to provide guidance on what she wanted to know as we continued, dismissing my concerns and seemed to be so focused on child support, property division which was not even my immediate concern as my concerns were more along the lines of safety, dv etc I was so confused.
Please try to be human! It takes nothing. blatant disregard for people whose journey you know nothing about does no good!
I told her right there- if you don’t understand me or you’ve chosen not to understand me, how can you represent me?
The fact that I was sent a follow up email days/week after, with the option to retain them, is quite laughable. You told me I didn’t convince you so why do you want my money to convince you? How do you treat me like that and expect me to come back?
For the firm, I suggest you recommend voluntary personality testing for lawyers so that you can match with clients appropriately. Also what’s the point of sending identification and the long bio data form pre-consultation questions ahead of the meeting if you know your bias outweighs the crux of the matter?
Awesome! I have never seen a lawyer so dedicated to doing not just a great job but an outstanding one. Thanks Steve - I would hire you again in a heartbeat.

Stephen Durbin & Associates exceeded all expectations during a challenging time. Their professionalism, expertise in family law, and compassionate approach set them apart. They took the time to understand every detail of my case, providing clear guidance and unwavering support throughout the process. Highly recommended!
I had a great experience at Stephen Durbin and Associates. I have recommended them to my friends and family.

I have been a low income, single mom most of my adult life. Ive never had money to really hire a lawyer. My daughter is now 15 years old when I got a better job to afford things like lawyers and anything else my daughter would need. Firstly, I wanted to hire a white male specifically to represent us against my daughters ‘eastern father’. We got Afnan, an eastern woman. She came across as understanding and competent so I hired her. I hired her in late April 2024, and didn’t receive the proper 13.1 forms until early September. She had me running to the courthouse myself multiple times over the summer for unnecessary paperwork that will never get looked at or useful for anything… Then after filling out the forms, she’s adamant on telling the courts I make significantly more than what I actually make, especially when Ive NEVER made more than $30000 over the 15 years Ive been raising my daughter. Shes insisting I make more than $60000, which has never happened in my lifetime, also considering Ive been working 2 jobs for years to make what I make. Thats the kind of justice and help you can expect from Steven Durbin and Associates.   Also, their office is really disorganized and feels like they cant get it together.

This law firm is by far the most abusive and manipulating place that I ever that the bad luck to encounter. Not only was I given terrible legal advice, but these robbers charged me a bunch of fictitious charges (to the tune of $1500) after I explicitly told them that I didn't want to continue with them.  After a few meetings on this topic they agreed to return $600 out of $1500 that they took out of my retainer. When the day came to get the money, they told me that I could only get it, if I signed a non-disclosure agreement, which was never discussed as a condition in any of the meetings.

Steve Durbin himself was trying to FORCE me to sign a contract to silence me from disclosing how they create fictitious charges ( like the $150 charge for printing or the $1500 to ‘close my file’) to take all that they can from from their clients without actually providing any worthwhile legal work.

If I can give you any piece of advice is RUN.  DO NOT CHOOSE THIS TERRIBLE FIRM. You will regret.

Horrible experience with the firm. After paying over $25,000 in three months my lawyer did nothing and then when I question this and suggested different options she quit on me the day before I had court. She said I didn’t have faith in her. How could I after months of zero leeway? I didnt see my child for 106 days while using this firm. I am shocked at the unprofessionalism and complete disregard from my child and my well being. Do NOT use this firm. You will be screwed over just like I was. I don’t know how they can use the title “best in custody issues” , because they don’t care about you or your children. Choose any other firm but this one!

I have nothing to compare this experience to. This is the first time I have ever needed a lawyer for anything. I came in desperate for help and guidance, they knew it and took full advantage. The lawyer they first put on my case dragged everything out at least a year longer than necessary, took weeks and months to answer emails and they didn't seem to care to fight for me. This one ended up leaving the firm (i found out through a automated reply email, when I sent one asking about updates). The second one just wanted to finish things up as we were close to the end. They said I'd get help with FRO and was left high and dry. Not before they nickle and dimed me for every little thing. I'm sure there are MUCH BETTER, more caring lawyers out there than this group. Don't waste your money here. Being a single mom just trying to protect my child, get custody, and the astronomical fees charged, it will take me years to recover from this expense. After speaking with others in similar situations as myself, it should NEVER have cost me as much as they have charged me to do what they did. So disgusting.

I have written one google review in the past. It is not common to get above and beyond service.  I wanted to express how happy I was with this firm and special shout out to Melissa Fedsin. I needed legal help with my separation with a very tight timeline. I am positive she had to work after hours to complete this for me and with a quick overview she was able to quickly grasp and understand my very complex situaton and provide thorough and complete legal advice to get the result that I wanted.

I would recommend this firm to anyone!

If I could give them 0 stars I would. Never kept  in contact paid over $12,000. A year later still never went to court. Now they want another $11,000. This place is a scam and will take your money until you fire them when nothing gets done. Gave them everything they need to catch my ex in a huge lie to the courts and they did nothing about it. We would go months without any communication until I message them then they tell me they are waiting on me when I already sent it in weeks before. They will take you money and do nothing. DO NOT DO BUSINESS WITH THEM!!!!

So I was referred to this firm through my work. Promising to save 25% if I went with them. This was my first mistake. The savings means nothing if they don’t solve my problems and help me get what I needed. Other than file paperwork my lawyer Catherine Andrews did nothing for me in my separation.  My ex took my children without a court order and spread endless lies about me in her affidavits. Catherine offered no solution aside from sending yet another correspondence that ultimately carried no real power. Later I found out we could have filed a motion which would have at least been something. A couple months later my lawyers firm decided to give themselves a 25% raise for all their hard work. Goodbye discount. At this point I started using Catherine only when it was absolutely necessary and started filling out and filing my own affidavits. I even started representing myself during my court conferences because last time I had Catherine sit beside me during a four way zoom call with my ex and her counsel she said and did nothing. By this point she basically said she wasn’t interested in representing me anymore. Had $600 dollars left in my retainer but she informed me it would take 6 weeks to close my file. They sent me a cheque for $7. In what world does someone continue to make money after you fire them. This is probably normal for all lawyers but doesn’t make it right. In conclusion don’t settle for just any lawyer you need to find the right fit. Someone who actually cares more about helping not just looking to take your money and doing the bare minimum which is ultimately the most stressful and financially important part of your life. Catherine Andrews and her firm will never be what you need to succeed.

If you are looking for top quality representation – then Stephen Durbin & Associates is right where you need to be. From day one they gave me peace of mind during a very difficult time in my life.
When I had met briefly with Stephen during my consultation, I was told that I could trust them to take care of me with my family law matter.
Nazifa Islam and her team – Hope and Chyvonne – were extremely professional, efficient, and completely transparent throughout the entire process. I needed someone attentive. I needed someone to advocate for me and my son. I needed this team – and they exceeded my expectations! They went above and beyond for me and not once made me feel like I was just another “File Number” to them. They were always available when I had questions or concerns, and truly made me feel at ease. Nazifa was brilliant and very knowledgeable; I was lucky to have her by my side. She advised me through my separation agreement, always pursuing not just what I wanted but what was in the best interests of me and my son. The outcome was in my favour.
Stephen Durbin & Associates gave me a voice when I felt silenced. Worth every single dime!! I highly recommend 😊

This place is awful

I wouldn't recommend to anyone.
Disgusting practices burn through your retainer and blame you.

Joke of a law firm. Save your time and look elsewhere. They take forever to respond to you charge you for everything instead of guiding you in the right direction. Asked them for advice as they should guide you was charged crazy amounts. Blew over $18 000 on this joke of a firm. For a simple case which should have ran no more than $5000 at most ended up resolving the whole case for them as it was getting prolonged for way too long. Save your money and time with not going to these guys. Had 2 people leave the firm during my case which ended up getting double billed for error of communication on their part. Bunch of SCAM artists

Thank you Faiza and Karen for helping me deal with a difficult ex husband!  I have no doubt, that if not for your knowledge and tenacity for the truth, he would still be poking around and causing me trouble.  Your thoughtfulness about my finances, and keeping this from trial, was greatly appreciated.  The settlement that you were able to have accepted was better than I could have hoped.  Even though I appreciate you both, I hope I never see you again!  haha!  Cheers to all of us and brighter days ahead!

Associates on vacation with no warning in the middle of tense mediation,..  but more importantly, they scammed my retainer money, took a huge sum more than was invoiced, ignored every message regarding my retainer being returned for 5 months..  Stephen was a great first consultant, but would never this firm again..   might need a lawyer to look over their invoicing.

If there was a 0 star option, they would have gotten it. Way over priced. Everything sounds great at the consultation, but it got to the point where I couldn’t even talk to them anymore. All I could think about was how much everything costs while nothing was getting done. I got severely ripped off. After getting a different lawyer, things have been much better; at a major fraction of the price. $23,000 for a folder with paperwork in it.  Makes me sick every time I think about it.

Guess times are hard since they're forging signatures on receipts to authorize credit card payments. Scumbags, like most lawyers. Guess they don't make enough as it is they've got to commit fraud. Not to mention charging for looking at emails they never respond to. Tell you they're giving you experienced lawyers and charge premium hour rates when they're not more than a year after completing the bar.

If you truly want to waste money and have nothing done in 6 months and only to get emails of "on vacation will return to office next week" In the 6 months i dealt with this law firm 4 lawyers had quit and at least 2 clerks. Literaly wasted my money and didnt produce a single piece of material pertaining to my case. If you do for some terrible reason do end up going to this law firm, be sure to ask about them about there contingency fees for winning a case, Which they ilegaly slapped on a father and were forced to give him back $72,500. Seiously dont waste your money or time. Im still waiting on my remaining funds 2 months after i closed my case . Taking on as many cases and deposits as possible and not producing any work expecting people to just keep paying out of desperation and fear

I’m very pleased to have the Law Firm of Stephen Durbin & Associates working for me.
Mehwish Rasheed is most thorough and professional as is her assistant
Jane Kameoka. The matter was dealt in an effective and timely manner. What a team!

I wanted to change my previous lawyer for months and after doing some research I decided to work with Stephen Durbin & associates! Their reviews were mostly positive on other websites except some of the reviews that complained about them being unresponsive to their phone calls and emails. I finally trusted the good reviews and had an initial consultation with one of the associates on Wednesday, February 5, 2020 at the Mississauga Office. They were very quick with responding to emails and phone calls before the initial appointment. I paid $283 for one hour consultation and the associate told me that she would call me back in a couple of days to update me about the fees and to arrange another consultation with Stephen. Today is February 20th and I still haven't heard back from anyone. I called their office multiple times on February 7th and 11th and etc. They said somebody will reach out to me soon. I also emailed them on February 12th but nobody has contacted me yet. I personally don’t recommend this law firm to anyone with a time sensitive case that needs extra attention but if you choose to work with them I hope you’ll have a better experience. After spending $283 and wasting 20 days, I decided to work with another lawyer.

would highly recommend this firm  especially  Lauren silver . they are very professional and efficient .i was in a bind needed a last minute lawyer and they took me on as a client walking me through the whole process. i am very happy with the outcome and know if needed legal representation  again would  differently use this firm

Scam artists!  For an amicable separation agreement, Mr. Durbin estimated costs at $10,000, and required a $5,000 retainer to begin work.  I got the exact SAME job done by a better lawyer for $500 - Basim at Shaikh Law Firm.  Basim was prompt, effective, and reasonable, completely unlike the greedy pocket-stuffing lawyers you’ll find with Durbin.
Great company to work with! An absolute pleasure to sort my legal matters with. Every meeting was prompt and efficient.

Working with Stephen and the team has been an absolute pleasure during a difficult time. They answered all my questions and made sure I was covered when I didn't even know I needed to be. Couldn't recommend more for anyone going through a divorce or separation!

After a consultation arranged by a workplace family assistance program, it was very clear that he was more interested in his Google review than the needs I had. He had a predetermined and clear objective of using the paid consultation as a sales opportunity as opposed to allotting the time to understand my unique circumstances. When he began to understand that I didn't need extensive legal help, he resorted to sales through fear by reminding me how scary and intimidating courts are. It was pathetic really.

As soon as he realized that my case wasn't a money maker, he cut the paid 30 minutes to 10, and left me to his assistant in a very arrogant and self important fashion. The assistant was very helpful, earning a second star that would otherwise not have been given.

I'm sure he is just as competent as his peers, maybe more, but wouldn't consider retaining him even if his rates were half of what they are and more consistent with his peers.

Mr. Durbin and the young man who would have handled my case were very professional and very kind hearted. My only wish is that i was able to procure a copy of the notes that were taken. Other then that my experiance was a pleasent one and i would recommend people to seek him out if they can.

I was fortunate to work with Stephen, Claire and Melissa for my divorce. In a sea of confusion and intimidation that is Family Law - these three people bring clarity, truth and results. Claire is a passionate and extremely knowledgeable legal professional. She is a unique breed and I highly recommend her for any Family Law issue. Stephen and Melissa were excellent at validation and discussing the key issues in the case to find a reasonable resolution. If you have an Family Law matter look no further, this is a special firm that will help you.

My dealings with Steve were in the realm of business contracts, a number of years before he became pre-eminent in the Family Law field.  As I have told others to whom I have recommended Steve, he impressed me greatly with his grasp of the subject,  attention to detail, the speed and thoroughness of his work, and his professionalism.  A remarkable professional.
As the Chairman and CEO of a successful renewables company, I deal with a lot of high-end professionals, and can truly appreciate these qualities.  I hope never to require his Family Law services personally, but would use him again for important business contracts in a heartbeat.  The point of this comment, in the context of his Family law practise, is that marital situations usually involve significant elements of understanding business, business contracts, and how the mind of a businessperson works.  Consequently, I would recommend that  any professional, or spouse of a professional, seek his services if required, to take advantage of these strengths, in order to maximize your likelihood of success in your own situation.

I don't know what I would have done without Mr. Durbin. Stephen is truly a master in the courtroom. We had a six day custody trial and everyday he amazed my family and I with his knowledge of the law. He was always honest and upfront with me on my chances of success. He devoted his heart and soul into my case and in the end we were successful in gaining joint custody with my home (father) as primary residence and were also awarded a substantial amount of court costs. Stephen is a great person in and outside of the courtroom and is always there when I need him. I highly recommend Stephen Durbin as a lawyer and as a friend. Thank you Stephen.
R.

Anyone who is involved in a divorce knows that everything about it quite literally sucks and we would rather walk on hot coals than go through it. But a good and fair lawyer can make all the difference. Stephen is that lawyer.

After a very bad experience with another local area family lawyer, I was highly skeptical of the chances of finding a good one. The search was difficult because there are few reviews online and you just don't know what sort of experience to expect until it is underway and often too late. After interviewing several family lawyers in the area, I chose Durbin and Associates. I got lucky, because it turned out that Stephen and his staff were exactly the right choice.

He is fair and straightforward in his case assessment, will give realistic expectations and does not sugar coat or make false promises that can't be delivered on. Stephen works with a realistic view, knows family law very well, and has a tremendous office staff, including a hard working and professional law clerk that will be able to do a lot of the work at a lower billing cost than the lawyers. This is an example of how Stephen will pay close attention to controlling the cost of what is a very expensive process, and he is sensitive to this  matter. I will just say that this is not the case with other lawyers, who are only interested in milking as many billable hours as possible.

Stephen was very sensitive to the needs of the children and recommended approaches that proved to be successful in getting fair custody arrangements. He and his office staff are responsive - I never had to wait for replies to calls or emails, which went a long way to reducing stress and making me feel that they were taking my case seriously. I could say many other positive things about this family law practice, but it is not necessary. I would recommend Stephen and his team to anyone without hesitation. To be honest, he is not cheap, but quite simply, you get what you pay for, and fewer hours at a higher rate with a good lawyer are better than a lot of hours at a lower rate without results.

Went through one horrible lawyer first, screwed things up very badly, and wish I had found Stephen first. Stephen works smart, knows his stuff and was sympathetic to me and my situation as his client. My spouse was insanely unreasonable and antagonistic, highly litigiuous to the point of calling for motions for every detail, and Stephen very professionally smoothed out difficult situations where he could. In the end, I got what I wanted which was to parent my children because of a recommendation from Stephen. Dont shop around - I recommend Stephen if you need a family lawyer who will work for you in your best interests.

I’m so lucky to find Stephen from lawyer’s website after having couple horrible lawyers. He is upfront and honest and did what he could do for his clients, he is a truly master in the courtroom. Under his direction and guidance, I won the case in the court which forced my greedy ex to stop her endless lawsuits finally. Steven is not only an great lawyer, but a great friend, he devoted his heart and soul to my case and supported me at any time I needed. He cares his client sincerely and did his best to save the cost for his clients. I strongly recommend Stephen as a family lawyer, he won’t do anything wrong for you. Thank you Steven for your guidance and support! Henry

Words cannot describe how happy i am with the work Steve has done for me. I have not seen my children in 2.5 years as my ex wife alienated the children from me, my previous 2 lawyers didnt do me any favours with any previous agreements we had, in fact the agreements positioned me further and further away from my children. If you are a parent you can relate how difficult it was for me not to see or hear from my children for 2.5 years. When i met Steve he took my large file became very intimate with my situtation and told me directly you will see and have your children within 4 months. As of today (June 2011) i see my children at all their sporting events (4 -5days a week) and this is only the beginning!!His tenacity,his excellent attention to detail and incredible knowledge to the family law has given me the 2 most important things in my life. Steve you are not only an incredible lawyer, but a great friend, i do not know how i can ever re-pay you. My kids and I thank you so much!
Not impressed. Seem to be far more concerned with retainers and billing that with client's matter.

Stephen is my go-to attorney during difficult times. His knowledge, wisdom, and expertise is simply unparalleled. He puts you right at ease and knows exactly how to handle any situation. Thank you for all your help.

Terrible service takes 20 minutes to even get an answer from them and the lawyer I was set up with was just awful, told I wanted it to be done with as fast as possible and 3 months has gone by and nothing has been done but I've been billed multiple times
Would never go back here
Great and professional. Interactions have been amazing.

I am a lawyer of many years at the bar. I know what to look for. I met Stephen almost a decade ago when I went in with someone close to me looking for a good divorce law firm. His firm took on the case and achieved unparallelled success. I wouldn’t recommend anyone else and in fact, I recommend all of my clients needing assistance in this field of law to him and his firm. I’ve only heard shining reviews from each of those I’ve sent. Don’t believe the few bad reviews that you read about him. Or his firm. That happens all the time with disgruntled clients, but more with opposing parties or other people who have an interest in bringing him down. I can vouch for that
The onboarding experience with the associate lawyer Afnan Arshad  and her clerk Jane Kameoka were very good. They were professional and provided great customer service!
responseFromOwnerText: We truly appreciate your feedback. It’s great to hear that Afnan and Jane were able to support you so well during your onboarding. Thank you for choosing our firm.

text: Since my first appointment, everything has been excellent. My lawyer has been very accurate in her advice regarding my case, and communication has been great at all times. I feel very safe and supported by the SD&A Group.
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for sharing your experience and for choosing to work with us. It means a lot to know that our efforts to provide clear advice and strong support have made a meaningful difference for you.

text:
I had the opportunity to work with Lisa and Afnan, and I was thoroughly impressed by their professionalism, diligence, and expertise. Throughout the process, they demonstrated exceptional communication skills, precise attention to detail, and a genuine commitment to achieving the best possible outcome.

Both Lisa and Afnan were consistently responsive, organized, and supportive, ensuring that I understood each step along the way. I particularly appreciated that Lisa also speaks French, which was a great advantage for me and made our communication even smoother.
Their professionalism and collaborative approach made the experience both efficient and reassuring. I highly recommend Lisa or Afnan to anyone seeking knowledgeable, reliable, and dedicated legal professionals.
responseFromOwnerText:
We sincerely appreciate your kind words and recommendation. It’s wonderful to know that Lisa and Afnan’s professionalism, communication, and dedication made such a positive impression. 

Providing clear guidance and support throughout the process is always our priority. 

Thank you for choosing our firm.

text:
I have the honor to express my deepest admiration for the work and exceptional professionalism of Stephen Durbin. He is not only a brilliant lawyer but also a person of impeccable reputation, remarkable intelligence, and a rare sense of justice.

Stephen Durbin embodies the qualities that distinguish true masters of their profession: outstanding competence, strategic thinking, impeccable tact, and genuine respect for every individual. His approach to every case is thoughtful, precise, and rooted in a profound understanding of the law.

He has a remarkable ability to identify the essence of even the most complex legal situations, make balanced decisions, and defend his position with dignity and strength. Thanks to his professionalism and dedication, many people have received not only legal protection but also restored confidence in justice.

Stephen Durbin is a lawyer you can trust without hesitation. His name has become a symbol of reliability, intelligence, and the highest standards of legal excellence.
From booking an initial consultation with Christina to meeting with the amazing Alessandra to discuss my case .. the process was fluid, transparent and professional.

I contacted Stephen some time ago with a problem I was having with my business. My landlord wanted to buy me out of my lease. Business was pretty bad anyway so I was almost willing to take a very small amount that he offered $68,000 (all numbers expressed here are in current value dollar amounts). Stephen told me to leave it in his hands and see what he could do. Little by little he negotiated with the landlord, bringing him up first to $360,000, then to $540,000, then to finally about $810,000! I was shocked that this was the result. But he clearly must know what he’s doing. This changed my life for the better and gave me another chance. I’m very thankful.

I couldn’t be more grateful for the outstanding service provided by Afnan Arshad. From our very first meeting, she demonstrated not only deep expertise and knowledge of the law but also genuine care and commitment to my case. She was always responsive, explained every step of the process clearly, and fought diligently to achieve the best possible outcome for me. Her professionalism, attention to detail, and dedication made a stressful situation much more manageable. I highly recommend Afnan to anyone in need of excellent legal representation.

Heartfelt Appreciation for Ms. Jane Kameoka

I’m writing with heartfelt thanks and deep appreciation for Ms. Jane Kameoka.
I am truly honoured and grateful for her unwavering support—her dedication has meant more to me than words can express. Over the course of a very complex and prolonged seven-year legal battle, Ms. Kameoka provided me with exceptional service, professionalism, and compassion.

Her legal expertise, clear communication, and strategic thinking were invaluable throughout my case. Her understanding of the facts and evidence was nothing short of brilliant. Thanks to her tireless efforts, I not only felt consistently supported but also achieved a favorable judgment.

Together with Ms. Mehwish Rashid, Jane Kameoka forms a highly skilled, client-focused legal team. They work diligently to resolve family law matters efficiently and effectively—avoiding unnecessary conflict and costly court proceedings whenever possible. When litigation is required, they stay focused on the core issues to help clients move forward with clarity and peace of mind.

I am forever grateful for Jane’s dedication and support, and I wholeheartedly recommend her to anyone in need of expert legal assistance.

Thank you again for your continued loyalty and care.
responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for your kind and heartfelt words. We’re honoured to have supported you through your legal matter, and we truly appreciate your recognition of Jane Kameoka’s dedication and expertise.

Your trust means a great deal to us, and we’re grateful to have been part of your journey.

text: Lisa Stern at Durbin & Associates did an amazing job supporting us through the entire family law process. We could not have done it without her ! Her patience and guidance during such a stressful time made all the difference in our experience !
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for taking the time to share your kind words! We’re thrilled to hear that Lisa Stern was able to provide the support you needed during a challenging time. At Stephen Durbin & Associates, we truly value our clients and their experiences, and it’s wonderful to know that Lisa made such a positive impact on yours. If you ever need assistance again, we’re here for you!

text: Afnan is super attentive and knowledgeable lawyer. She is highly aware of manipulative tactics and abusive strategies often used by the opposing ( abusive/ manipulative ) party, I completely trust her and highly recommend her.

I had a lawyer previously before SDA Law firm and I had spend so much money and nothing came of it. than I found SDA lawyers, Lisa Stern and her assistant Rosa Fuda, was there to help me and in such a short time all my divorce was process and completed . I am so grateful to them,  They keep working with me and did not let me down even when all the court was done, they stayed and still help me to get all document I needed. their patience and their work attic is fabulous.   I recommend them to any one.  thank you so much.

I had  a consultation meeting with Mehwish she was rude and condescending, unexpected from a family law professional but I had the worst experience with this woman. It’s been 6 months yet so fresh in my memory. I’ve met with lawyers in the past, no one has ever made me feel this way, respect in professional settings is so basic. Her bias was so visible, not sure where it came from, but so strong it had to show on the outside. An unforgettable experience. My case was high conflict one, she left me feeling worse, could barely even express myself further at some point as I began to feel incoherent and misunderstood because she kept changing the line of discussion, blurting into my responses, giving very cold stares. She just refused to listen. I gave up and literally broke down, wishing I could turn back the hands of time, to avoid this place. I thought I had read some good reviews before going there. I was not asking for pity or sympathy, just basic guidance.
She also seemed to be rushing to close the meeting, from the first 5mins she was rushing, and this session wasn’t even free, it cost $220
She communicated a generic guideline at the start, yet failed to provide guidance on what she wanted to know as we continued, dismissing my concerns and seemed to be so focused on child support, property division which was not even my immediate concern as my concerns were more along the lines of safety, dv etc I was so confused.
Please try to be human! It takes nothing. blatant disregard for people whose journey you know nothing about does no good!
I told her right there- if you don’t understand me or you’ve chosen not to understand me, how can you represent me?
The fact that I was sent a follow up email days/week after, with the option to retain them, is quite laughable. You told me I didn’t convince you so why do you want my money to convince you? How do you treat me like that and expect me to come back?
For the firm, I suggest you recommend voluntary personality testing for lawyers so that you can match with clients appropriately. Also what’s the point of sending identification and the long bio data form pre-consultation questions ahead of the meeting if you know your bias outweighs the crux of the matter?
Awesome! I have never seen a lawyer so dedicated to doing not just a great job but an outstanding one. Thanks Steve - I would hire you again in a heartbeat.

Stephen Durbin & Associates exceeded all expectations during a challenging time. Their professionalism, expertise in family law, and compassionate approach set them apart. They took the time to understand every detail of my case, providing clear guidance and unwavering support throughout the process. Highly recommended!
I had a great experience at Stephen Durbin and Associates. I have recommended them to my friends and family.

I have been a low income, single mom most of my adult life. Ive never had money to really hire a lawyer. My daughter is now 15 years old when I got a better job to afford things like lawyers and anything else my daughter would need. Firstly, I wanted to hire a white male specifically to represent us against my daughters ‘eastern father’. We got Afnan, an eastern woman. She came across as understanding and competent so I hired her. I hired her in late April 2024, and didn’t receive the proper 13.1 forms until early September. She had me running to the courthouse myself multiple times over the summer for unnecessary paperwork that will never get looked at or useful for anything… Then after filling out the forms, she’s adamant on telling the courts I make significantly more than what I actually make, especially when Ive NEVER made more than $30000 over the 15 years Ive been raising my daughter. Shes insisting I make more than $60000, which has never happened in my lifetime, also considering Ive been working 2 jobs for years to make what I make. Thats the kind of justice and help you can expect from Steven Durbin and Associates.   Also, their office is really disorganized and feels like they cant get it together.

This law firm is by far the most abusive and manipulating place that I ever that the bad luck to encounter. Not only was I given terrible legal advice, but these robbers charged me a bunch of fictitious charges (to the tune of $1500) after I explicitly told them that I didn't want to continue with them.  After a few meetings on this topic they agreed to return $600 out of $1500 that they took out of my retainer. When the day came to get the money, they told me that I could only get it, if I signed a non-disclosure agreement, which was never discussed as a condition in any of the meetings.

Steve Durbin himself was trying to FORCE me to sign a contract to silence me from disclosing how they create fictitious charges ( like the $150 charge for printing or the $1500 to ‘close my file’) to take all that they can from from their clients without actually providing any worthwhile legal work.

If I can give you any piece of advice is RUN.  DO NOT CHOOSE THIS TERRIBLE FIRM. You will regret.

Horrible experience with the firm. After paying over $25,000 in three months my lawyer did nothing and then when I question this and suggested different options she quit on me the day before I had court. She said I didn’t have faith in her. How could I after months of zero leeway? I didnt see my child for 106 days while using this firm. I am shocked at the unprofessionalism and complete disregard from my child and my well being. Do NOT use this firm. You will be screwed over just like I was. I don’t know how they can use the title “best in custody issues” , because they don’t care about you or your children. Choose any other firm but this one!

I have nothing to compare this experience to. This is the first time I have ever needed a lawyer for anything. I came in desperate for help and guidance, they knew it and took full advantage. The lawyer they first put on my case dragged everything out at least a year longer than necessary, took weeks and months to answer emails and they didn't seem to care to fight for me. This one ended up leaving the firm (i found out through a automated reply email, when I sent one asking about updates). The second one just wanted to finish things up as we were close to the end. They said I'd get help with FRO and was left high and dry. Not before they nickle and dimed me for every little thing. I'm sure there are MUCH BETTER, more caring lawyers out there than this group. Don't waste your money here. Being a single mom just trying to protect my child, get custody, and the astronomical fees charged, it will take me years to recover from this expense. After speaking with others in similar situations as myself, it should NEVER have cost me as much as they have charged me to do what they did. So disgusting.

I have written one google review in the past. It is not common to get above and beyond service.  I wanted to express how happy I was with this firm and special shout out to Melissa Fedsin. I needed legal help with my separation with a very tight timeline. I am positive she had to work after hours to complete this for me and with a quick overview she was able to quickly grasp and understand my very complex situaton and provide thorough and complete legal advice to get the result that I wanted.

I would recommend this firm to anyone!

If I could give them 0 stars I would. Never kept  in contact paid over $12,000. A year later still never went to court. Now they want another $11,000. This place is a scam and will take your money until you fire them when nothing gets done. Gave them everything they need to catch my ex in a huge lie to the courts and they did nothing about it. We would go months without any communication until I message them then they tell me they are waiting on me when I already sent it in weeks before. They will take you money and do nothing. DO NOT DO BUSINESS WITH THEM!!!!

So I was referred to this firm through my work. Promising to save 25% if I went with them. This was my first mistake. The savings means nothing if they don’t solve my problems and help me get what I needed. Other than file paperwork my lawyer Catherine Andrews did nothing for me in my separation.  My ex took my children without a court order and spread endless lies about me in her affidavits. Catherine offered no solution aside from sending yet another correspondence that ultimately carried no real power. Later I found out we could have filed a motion which would have at least been something. A couple months later my lawyers firm decided to give themselves a 25% raise for all their hard work. Goodbye discount. At this point I started using Catherine only when it was absolutely necessary and started filling out and filing my own affidavits. I even started representing myself during my court conferences because last time I had Catherine sit beside me during a four way zoom call with my ex and her counsel she said and did nothing. By this point she basically said she wasn’t interested in representing me anymore. Had $600 dollars left in my retainer but she informed me it would take 6 weeks to close my file. They sent me a cheque for $7. In what world does someone continue to make money after you fire them. This is probably normal for all lawyers but doesn’t make it right. In conclusion don’t settle for just any lawyer you need to find the right fit. Someone who actually cares more about helping not just looking to take your money and doing the bare minimum which is ultimately the most stressful and financially important part of your life. Catherine Andrews and her firm will never be what you need to succeed.

If you are looking for top quality representation – then Stephen Durbin & Associates is right where you need to be. From day one they gave me peace of mind during a very difficult time in my life.
When I had met briefly with Stephen during my consultation, I was told that I could trust them to take care of me with my family law matter.
Nazifa Islam and her team – Hope and Chyvonne – were extremely professional, efficient, and completely transparent throughout the entire process. I needed someone attentive. I needed someone to advocate for me and my son. I needed this team – and they exceeded my expectations! They went above and beyond for me and not once made me feel like I was just another “File Number” to them. They were always available when I had questions or concerns, and truly made me feel at ease. Nazifa was brilliant and very knowledgeable; I was lucky to have her by my side. She advised me through my separation agreement, always pursuing not just what I wanted but what was in the best interests of me and my son. The outcome was in my favour.
Stephen Durbin & Associates gave me a voice when I felt silenced. Worth every single dime!! I highly recommend 😊

This place is awful

I wouldn't recommend to anyone.
Disgusting practices burn through your retainer and blame you.

Joke of a law firm. Save your time and look elsewhere. They take forever to respond to you charge you for everything instead of guiding you in the right direction. Asked them for advice as they should guide you was charged crazy amounts. Blew over $18 000 on this joke of a firm. For a simple case which should have ran no more than $5000 at most ended up resolving the whole case for them as it was getting prolonged for way too long. Save your money and time with not going to these guys. Had 2 people leave the firm during my case which ended up getting double billed for error of communication on their part. Bunch of SCAM artists

Thank you Faiza and Karen for helping me deal with a difficult ex husband!  I have no doubt, that if not for your knowledge and tenacity for the truth, he would still be poking around and causing me trouble.  Your thoughtfulness about my finances, and keeping this from trial, was greatly appreciated.  The settlement that you were able to have accepted was better than I could have hoped.  Even though I appreciate you both, I hope I never see you again!  haha!  Cheers to all of us and brighter days ahead!

Associates on vacation with no warning in the middle of tense mediation,..  but more importantly, they scammed my retainer money, took a huge sum more than was invoiced, ignored every message regarding my retainer being returned for 5 months..  Stephen was a great first consultant, but would never this firm again..   might need a lawyer to look over their invoicing.

If there was a 0 star option, they would have gotten it. Way over priced. Everything sounds great at the consultation, but it got to the point where I couldn’t even talk to them anymore. All I could think about was how much everything costs while nothing was getting done. I got severely ripped off. After getting a different lawyer, things have been much better; at a major fraction of the price. $23,000 for a folder with paperwork in it.  Makes me sick every time I think about it.

Guess times are hard since they're forging signatures on receipts to authorize credit card payments. Scumbags, like most lawyers. Guess they don't make enough as it is they've got to commit fraud. Not to mention charging for looking at emails they never respond to. Tell you they're giving you experienced lawyers and charge premium hour rates when they're not more than a year after completing the bar.

If you truly want to waste money and have nothing done in 6 months and only to get emails of "on vacation will return to office next week" In the 6 months i dealt with this law firm 4 lawyers had quit and at least 2 clerks. Literaly wasted my money and didnt produce a single piece of material pertaining to my case. If you do for some terrible reason do end up going to this law firm, be sure to ask about them about there contingency fees for winning a case, Which they ilegaly slapped on a father and were forced to give him back $72,500. Seiously dont waste your money or time. Im still waiting on my remaining funds 2 months after i closed my case . Taking on as many cases and deposits as possible and not producing any work expecting people to just keep paying out of desperation and fear

I’m very pleased to have the Law Firm of Stephen Durbin & Associates working for me.
Mehwish Rasheed is most thorough and professional as is her assistant
Jane Kameoka. The matter was dealt in an effective and timely manner. What a team!

I wanted to change my previous lawyer for months and after doing some research I decided to work with Stephen Durbin & associates! Their reviews were mostly positive on other websites except some of the reviews that complained about them being unresponsive to their phone calls and emails. I finally trusted the good reviews and had an initial consultation with one of the associates on Wednesday, February 5, 2020 at the Mississauga Office. They were very quick with responding to emails and phone calls before the initial appointment. I paid $283 for one hour consultation and the associate told me that she would call me back in a couple of days to update me about the fees and to arrange another consultation with Stephen. Today is February 20th and I still haven't heard back from anyone. I called their office multiple times on February 7th and 11th and etc. They said somebody will reach out to me soon. I also emailed them on February 12th but nobody has contacted me yet. I personally don’t recommend this law firm to anyone with a time sensitive case that needs extra attention but if you choose to work with them I hope you’ll have a better experience. After spending $283 and wasting 20 days, I decided to work with another lawyer.

would highly recommend this firm  especially  Lauren silver . they are very professional and efficient .i was in a bind needed a last minute lawyer and they took me on as a client walking me through the whole process. i am very happy with the outcome and know if needed legal representation  again would  differently use this firm

Scam artists!  For an amicable separation agreement, Mr. Durbin estimated costs at $10,000, and required a $5,000 retainer to begin work.  I got the exact SAME job done by a better lawyer for $500 - Basim at Shaikh Law Firm.  Basim was prompt, effective, and reasonable, completely unlike the greedy pocket-stuffing lawyers you’ll find with Durbin.
Great company to work with! An absolute pleasure to sort my legal matters with. Every meeting was prompt and efficient.

Working with Stephen and the team has been an absolute pleasure during a difficult time. They answered all my questions and made sure I was covered when I didn't even know I needed to be. Couldn't recommend more for anyone going through a divorce or separation!

After a consultation arranged by a workplace family assistance program, it was very clear that he was more interested in his Google review than the needs I had. He had a predetermined and clear objective of using the paid consultation as a sales opportunity as opposed to allotting the time to understand my unique circumstances. When he began to understand that I didn't need extensive legal help, he resorted to sales through fear by reminding me how scary and intimidating courts are. It was pathetic really.

As soon as he realized that my case wasn't a money maker, he cut the paid 30 minutes to 10, and left me to his assistant in a very arrogant and self important fashion. The assistant was very helpful, earning a second star that would otherwise not have been given.

I'm sure he is just as competent as his peers, maybe more, but wouldn't consider retaining him even if his rates were half of what they are and more consistent with his peers.

Mr. Durbin and the young man who would have handled my case were very professional and very kind hearted. My only wish is that i was able to procure a copy of the notes that were taken. Other then that my experiance was a pleasent one and i would recommend people to seek him out if they can.

I was fortunate to work with Stephen, Claire and Melissa for my divorce. In a sea of confusion and intimidation that is Family Law - these three people bring clarity, truth and results. Claire is a passionate and extremely knowledgeable legal professional. She is a unique breed and I highly recommend her for any Family Law issue. Stephen and Melissa were excellent at validation and discussing the key issues in the case to find a reasonable resolution. If you have an Family Law matter look no further, this is a special firm that will help you.

My dealings with Steve were in the realm of business contracts, a number of years before he became pre-eminent in the Family Law field.  As I have told others to whom I have recommended Steve, he impressed me greatly with his grasp of the subject,  attention to detail, the speed and thoroughness of his work, and his professionalism.  A remarkable professional.
As the Chairman and CEO of a successful renewables company, I deal with a lot of high-end professionals, and can truly appreciate these qualities.  I hope never to require his Family Law services personally, but would use him again for important business contracts in a heartbeat.  The point of this comment, in the context of his Family law practise, is that marital situations usually involve significant elements of understanding business, business contracts, and how the mind of a businessperson works.  Consequently, I would recommend that  any professional, or spouse of a professional, seek his services if required, to take advantage of these strengths, in order to maximize your likelihood of success in your own situation.

I don't know what I would have done without Mr. Durbin. Stephen is truly a master in the courtroom. We had a six day custody trial and everyday he amazed my family and I with his knowledge of the law. He was always honest and upfront with me on my chances of success. He devoted his heart and soul into my case and in the end we were successful in gaining joint custody with my home (father) as primary residence and were also awarded a substantial amount of court costs. Stephen is a great person in and outside of the courtroom and is always there when I need him. I highly recommend Stephen Durbin as a lawyer and as a friend. Thank you Stephen.
R.

Anyone who is involved in a divorce knows that everything about it quite literally sucks and we would rather walk on hot coals than go through it. But a good and fair lawyer can make all the difference. Stephen is that lawyer.

After a very bad experience with another local area family lawyer, I was highly skeptical of the chances of finding a good one. The search was difficult because there are few reviews online and you just don't know what sort of experience to expect until it is underway and often too late. After interviewing several family lawyers in the area, I chose Durbin and Associates. I got lucky, because it turned out that Stephen and his staff were exactly the right choice.

He is fair and straightforward in his case assessment, will give realistic expectations and does not sugar coat or make false promises that can't be delivered on. Stephen works with a realistic view, knows family law very well, and has a tremendous office staff, including a hard working and professional law clerk that will be able to do a lot of the work at a lower billing cost than the lawyers. This is an example of how Stephen will pay close attention to controlling the cost of what is a very expensive process, and he is sensitive to this  matter. I will just say that this is not the case with other lawyers, who are only interested in milking as many billable hours as possible.

Stephen was very sensitive to the needs of the children and recommended approaches that proved to be successful in getting fair custody arrangements. He and his office staff are responsive - I never had to wait for replies to calls or emails, which went a long way to reducing stress and making me feel that they were taking my case seriously. I could say many other positive things about this family law practice, but it is not necessary. I would recommend Stephen and his team to anyone without hesitation. To be honest, he is not cheap, but quite simply, you get what you pay for, and fewer hours at a higher rate with a good lawyer are better than a lot of hours at a lower rate without results.
